# Flight

**Object**

Location and scheduling information for an airplane flight.

## Declaration

```swift
object Flight
```

## Defining a Flight Reservation

- **Airline**: An airline’s name and identifier.
- **Airport**: The name and location of an airport.

items.description: The name and location of an airport.
items.name: Airport
